snippet.title: பங்குனி அமாவாசை 18-03-2026 அம்மன் பாடல்கள் | Panguni Amavasai Amman Songs - JukeBox | Vijay Musicals
snippet.description:
Songs : Panguni Amavasai Amman Songs - JukeBox
Singers : Veeramanidasan, Dhanyasree, Sadasivam, Ramu
Video Powered : Kathiravan Krishnan
Production : Vijay Musicals
#vijaymusicals #ammansongstamil #amavasai #panguni 

01) பவனி வருகிறாள் அம்மா வருகிறாள்
குரலிசை : வீரமணிதாசன்
கவியாக்கம் : முகிலன்
இசை : D V ரமணி

02) தேரு வருது தேரு வருது
குரலிசை : சதாசிவம்
கவியாக்கம் : முகிலன்
இசை : கண்மணிராஜா

03) மருவத்தூரில் திருக்கோயில் கொண்ட
குரலிசை : புஷ்பவனம் குப்புசாமி
கவியாக்கம் : செங்கதிர்வாணன்
இசை : கண்மணிராஜா

04) கேட்டது அனைத்தும் கொடுத்திடுவாள்
குரலிசை : தன்யஸ்ரீ
கவியாக்கம் : P செந்தில்குமார்
இசை : வீரமணி கண்ணன்

05) அம்மா உனக்கு ஒண்ணாம் கரகம்
குரலிசை : ராமு
கவியாக்கம் : கவிநிலா
இசை : அன்புராஜ்

06) வெக்காளி அம்மனுக்கு வேண்டிக்கிட்டு
குரலிசை : ராஜராஜ சோழன்
கவியாக்கம் : ராம்
இசை : பல்லவி பிரகாஷ்

07) பத்ரகாளி சக்தி நீலி பராசக்தி நீ
குரலிசை : L R ஈஸ்வரி
கவியாக்கம் : தமிழ்நம்பி
இசை : சுரும்பியன்

To get more updates follow us on :

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/vijaymusicals/
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/VijayMusical

snippet.title: Vishwanath & Sons Teaser OST (Tamil) | Suriya, Mamitha Baiju | G V Prakash Kumar | Venky Atluri
snippet.description:
LISTEN: Vishwanath & Sons Teaser OST (Tamil) on Aditya Music Tamil.

#VishwanathAndSonsTeaserOST #VishwanathAndSons #Suriya #MamithaBaiju #GVPrakash #VenkyAtluri 

Music: G V Prakash Kumar
Lyrics: Uma Devi
Programmed by Aswin Sathya
Additional Percussions : Dan Kristen
Vocals : Ajai S Kashyap, Aavani Malhar
Flutes : Lalit Talluri
Veena : Punya Srinivas

A heartfelt journey of dreams, emotions, and unexpected love unfolds. ❤️

Directed by Venky Atluri, the film is produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi and Sai Soujanya under Sithara Entertainments and Fortune Four Cinemas, and presented by Srikara Studios.

Featuring music by G. V. Prakash Kumar, cinematography by Nimish Ravi, editing by Navin Nooli, and production design by Banglan.

Aaha Tamatar Bade Majedaar | आहा टमाटर बड़े मजेदार | Hindi Nursery Rhyme | #sonyrhymestv 

Video Name :-Aaha Tamatar Bade Mazedar 
Singer :- Palak Gujela
Lyrics :- 
Music :- 
FD/TR :- FD25061621069/OTR5077

Aaha Tamatar Bade Majedaar is a fun and popular Hindi nursery rhyme loved by kids 🍅🎶.
This cheerful rhyme features a cute tomato character and playful lyrics that make children laugh, sing, and learn at the same time.

With colorful animation, catchy music, and joyful visuals, this video is perfect for babies, toddlers, and preschool kids. It helps improve rhythm, listening skills, and early language learning in a fun and engaging way.

✨ Watch, Sing & Enjoy with Your Kids!
👶 Perfect for Babies, Toddlers & Kids
🎵 Fun & Musical Nursery Rhyme
🎨 Bright & Colorful Cartoon Animation
📚 Supports Early Learning

snippet.title: Tuition Badmashi Kaa - Hemant Faujdar, Kiran, Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma, Ajay Dhankhar, AmanJaji
snippet.description:
Tuition Badmashi Kaa - Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar, Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma,  Aman Jaji, Ajay Dhankhar, Narender Jaji, Zipsi Studio, Saya Films.

Singer: Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma
Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music/Composer: Aman Jaji

#tuitionbadmashikaa  #desirecords  #haryanvi  


Black Moon Films Presents Tuition Badmashi Kaa penned by Ajay Dhankhar, performed by Mr. Hemant Faujdar & Miss Kiran Brar, sung by Mr. Masoom Sharma, Miss Manisha Sharma Ji, harmony by Mr. Aman Jaji, lived by Mr. Ajay Dhankhar & Mr. Narender Jaji

Starring: Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar
Supporting Actor: Arun Malik, Kiyaan Malik, Madhav Maddy
Singer: Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma
Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music: Aman Jaji
Director: Ajay Dhankhar
Art Director: Vijay Giri
Action Director: Vishal Bhargav
Assistant Director: Vivek Garg, Narender Jaji, Rohit Dhankhar
Creative Head: Narender Jaji
Camera Team A: Aakash Ganga Films
Camera Team B: Saya Films
DOP: Sunil
Edit: Zipsi Studio
VFX: Himanshu Gulia
Publicity Design: Pankaj Kumar (+91-89492-12414)
Music Streaming Poster Design: Sumit Bamal
Photography & BTS: Simran Ubhi
Production: Akash Ganga Films & Manjeet Productions
Makeup: Mithoon
Project By: Ajay Dhankhar
Promotions: Urbane Loop Media 

LYRICS: 
Hoo Diet Teri Ka Raaz Bata Kyun Mare Khoon Ubada Re
Panipat Me Faer Tera Gunje Pura Ambala Re
Hoo Diet Teri Ka Raaz Bata Kyun Mare Khoon Ubada Re
Panipat Me Faer Tera Gunje Pura Ambala Re

Re Tu Fuke Cash Aur Lerya Aish Issi Konsi Kare Funkari Re
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Job Ter Sarkari Hai

Ohh Khoon Me Pump Ya Kare Dileri Na Milte Kite Bazara Mein
Sooya Ki Re Baat Chood Tu Dhund Ke Dikha Hzara Mein
Khoon Me Pump Ya Kare Dileri Na Milte Kite Bazara Mein
Sooya Ki Re Baat Chood Tu Dhund Ke Dikha Hzara Mein
Re Gaat Me Jaan Ya Bhari Padi Janu Nila Ford Saan Athasi Ka

Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Kit Karna Asla Use Gori Kit Karna Use Gndasi Ka
Ohh Ankh Aag Te Laal Teri Aur Asla Hardam Sath Rhve
Entry Teri Pe Sare Haan Kyun Pache Police Tainat Rahve
Tere Pache Police Tainat Rahve

Na Mran Maran Te Darta Tu Na Ke Jung Jiten Ki Tyari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Re Choda Toh Mere Murder Case Aur Chalis Case Frari Ke
Ho Tere Yaar Ne Paade Filter Mehkme Sarkari Ke
Mehkme Sarkari Ke…

Shehri Paplu Ke Jane Re Swad Yo Desi Lassi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Kit Karna Asla Use Gori Kit Karna Use Gndasi Ka

Agee Pache Rahve Media Tu Itna Charchit Chehra Hai
Ohh Sunya Tera Itihas Mane Samunder Te Bhi Gehra Hai
Sunya Tera Itihas Mane Samunder Te Bhi Gehra Hai
Udti Udti Khabar Mile Teri Encounter Ki Tyari Hai
Udti Udti Khabar Mile Teri Encounter Ki Tyari Hai

Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Ter Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Ter Sarkari Hai
Akhbar Ka Pehla Page Dekh Tu Yaar Ka Photu Pavega
Sher Yo Bukha Marjave ga Par Kade Ghass Na Khavega
Re Sher Yo Bukha Marjave ga Par Kade Ghass Na Khavega

Mukesh Jaji Kaam Kare Jo Vo Kaam Nahi Koi Hassi Ka 
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Ohh Mere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka

snippet.title: JODI KORO MISS | BIDISHA DEVI FT. NITUL DADHARA | DEEPJYOTI MAHANTA | SUMI BORAH | NEW ASSAMESE SONG
snippet.description:
JODI KORO MISS | BIDISHA DEVI FT. NITUL DADHARA | DEEPJYOTI MAHANTA | SUMI BORAH | NEW ASSAMESE SONG

“JODI KORO MISS” by Bidisha Devi ft. Nitul Dadhara, featuring Deepjyoti Mahanta & Sumi Borah, is a soulful Assamese musical dance number about love, missing someone special, and unspoken emotions… 💫

Directed by Deepjyoti Mahanta, this video delivers stunning visuals, groovy beats, and captivating vocals that will keep you hooked ❤️🔥🎶

👉 If you’ve ever missed someone… this song is for you 🌙
👉 Don’t forget to LIKE, SHARE & COMMENT your favorite part
👉 Subscribe for more trending Assamese music


⸻

Audio Credits

Vocals – Bidisha Devi ft. Nitul Dadhara
Lyrics & Composition – Abhimegh Gogoi
Music – Wasim Ayan
Additional Melody – Hrishikesh Madhav (Roni)
Guitar/Ukulele – Bishwa Bidyut Das
Mix & Master – Koustav Saikia
Recorded by – Nikhilesh @Kauzzy Records

⸻

Video Credits

Starring – Deepjyoti Mahanta, Sumi Borah
Direction – Deepjyoti Mahanta
AD – Riyan Dipen Nath
Cinematography & Editing – NJ
Dance Choreography – Sumi Borah
DI – Khalid Nazim
Drone – Riyan Dipen Nath
Camera Assist – Kailash Boro
Makeup – Ezabella
Stills – Ankumoni, Riyan Dipen Nath
Thumbnail – Nongthombam Deepak
Production Manager – Dhanjit Haloi

snippet.title: कर ना सके हम प्यार का सौदा | Kal Ki Awaz | Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu Songs | Amrita Singh
snippet.description:
सुरों की मल्लिका आशा भोसले और मधुर आवाज के जादूगर कुमार सानु की आवाज़ में डूबे, हम 90 के दशक के दिल छू लेने वाले नगमों की एक याद भरी यात्रा पर निकल पड़ते हैं। 'कल की आवाज़' फिल्म का यह गाना, 'कर ना सके हम प्यार का सौदा', प्यार और विरह की भावनाओं को खूबसूरती से दर्शाता है। इस गाने में आशा जी और कुमार सानु जी ने अपनी आवाज़ से जो दर्द और एहसास भरा है, वह आज भी हमारे दिलों को छू जाता है। 



Credits :

Song: Kar Na Sake Hum Pyar Ka Sauda
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


यह गाना सिर्फ एक धुन नहीं, बल्कि एक अहसास है, एक कहानी है जो हमारे दिलों में बसी हुई है। यह हमें उस दौर की याद दिलाता है जब प्यार में सादगी और गहराई होती थी। आशा जी और कुमार सानु जी की आवाज़ का जादू आज भी बरकरार है, और यह गाना हमें बार-बार सुनने को मजबूर करता है।

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो लाइक करना न भूलें! कमेंट करके बताएं कि आपका पसंदीदा 90 के दशक का गाना कौन सा है, और ऐसे ही और भी मधुर नगमों के लिए चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें।

Let the magic of music live on… #AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #HindiSongs #90sMusic #SentimentalSongs #BollywoodClassics #KarNaSakeHumPyarKaSauda #कल_की_आवाज़


#AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #HindiSongs #90sHindiSongs #SentimentalSongs #SadSongs #RomanticSongs #BollywoodClassics #OldHindiSongs #IndianMusic #KalKiAwaz #KarNaSakeHumPyarKaSauda #EmotionalSongs #ClassicHindiMusic #Bollywood #AshaBhosleSongs #KumarSanuSongs #1992Songs #90sHits #NostalgicSongs #BestHindiSongs #HindiLoveSongs #HeartTouchingSongs #MelodySongs #EvergreenSongs #OldIsGold #IndianClassicSongs #IndianSentimentalSongs

snippet.title: Manakannapodichey Song Telugu Lyrics | Parugu Movie | Allu Arjun, Sheela | Mani Sharma
snippet.description:
WATCH Manakannapodichey Song with Telugu Lyrics from the Movie Parugu.

Song Details:-

Song: Manakannapodichey 
Lyrics: Anantha Sriram
Singer: Rahul Nambiar
Music: Mani Sharma 

Movie Details:-

Movie Name: Parugu
Banner: Sri Venkateswara Creations
Produced: Dil Raju
Director: Bhaskar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Sheela Kaur 
Audio On: Aditya Music

Manakannapodichey Song Telugu Lyrics:-

ఎన్నెన్నెన్నో ఊహలే గుండెల్లో ఉన్నాయి నిన్నే ఊరించాలని అన్నాయి
ఎన్నెన్నెన్నో ఆశలే కళ్ళల్లో చేరాయి నిన్నే ప్రేమించాలని అమ్మాయి
దూరం పెంచిన కరిగించానుగా కళ్లెం వేసినా కదిలొస్తానుగా…
మనకన్నా పొడిచే మొనగాడే లేడమ్మో ప్రతి గంట కొలిచే ప్రేమికుడే రాడమ్మో
మన చెయ్యే పడితే అది నీకే మేలమ్మో నన్ను నువ్వే విడిచే అవకాశం రాదమ్మో
అసలిట్టా నీ వెంట నేనెట్టా పడ్డానే అనుకుంటే అప్సరసయినా నా గుమ్మంలోకొస్తాదే
విసుగెత్తిపోయేలా ఓ బెట్టు చెయ్యొద్దే చనువిస్తే నా చిరునవ్వే నీ పెదవుల్లో ఉంటాదే
ఇన్నాళ్లు భూలోకంలో ఏ మూలో ఉన్నావే అందిస్తా ఆకాశాన్నే అంతో ఇంతో ప్రేమించావంటే
అలనాటి రామయ్య సంద్రాన్నే దాటాడే బలమైన వారధి కట్టి సీతని ఇట్టే పొందాడే
మన మధ్య నీ మౌనం సంద్రంలా నిండిందే మనసే ఓ వారధి చేసి నీకిక సొంతం అవుతానే
చంద్రున్నే చుట్టేస్తానే చేత్తుల్లో  పెడతానే ఇంకా నువ్వు ఆలోచిస్తూ కాలాన్నంతా ఖాళీ చెయ్యొద్దే 

#Manakannapodicheysong #Parugu #Alluarjun #Sheelakaur  #Manisharma #Ananthasriram #TeluguSongs #TeluguLyricalSongs #TeluguHitSongs #TeluguPopularSongs #TeluguMovieSongs #BestTeluguSongs #TollywoodSongs #TeluguMusic #MaaPaataMeeNota
